notes: v1.14.152 - Card CORNER-ICON + METAL-GLASS across #ref-grid / #work-grid / .deploy-tools-grid. SUPERSEDES the .151 center-watermark block (replaced in place, no dead CSS). Icon bleeds off the TOP-RIGHT corner as a faint 131px/0.28 watermark (was center 100px/0.40 ghost); title+meta pin BOTTOM-LEFT as the hero over a radial legibility scrim anchored bottom-left (12%/88%, ::after; was bottom linear). GLASS UPGRADE: radial --rfac accent co-located top-right to halo the corner icon, 1px top metal hairline, layered accent box-shadow edge (outer ambient + inner accent), a ::before diagonal sweep staggered by nth-child (rfCardSweep, prefers-reduced-motion honored), and a :active press-bloom that brightens the border and lifts the corner icon to 0.50. Selected-state is PRESS-only by design: grid cards are momentary launchers (showRefTab/showWorkTab), nothing persists an .active class -> a persistent glow would need JS (out of CSS-only scope). CSS-ONLY, body.rd-scoped -> ?legacy=1 byte-identical. No markup change, no new assets (reuses shipped rf/action/tool webps) -> SW precache LIST unchanged; CACHE_VERSION bumps to bust the HTML. Handles wrapped(.rf-cic)/bare dual markup shapes as .151 did. Three-stamp lockstep 151->152. Gates: static <style> brace 3514/3514 (was 3504 +net10), whole-file 10138/10138, node --check x3 (no JS touched = regression guard), version.json valid JSON, CRLF/LF preserved. DEVICE-VERIFY (gloved, HARD-STOP): confirm v1.14.152; Reference(6)+Work(4)+Deploy>Tools(6) show icon bleeding off top-right at 0.28 with title bottom-left as hero; press a card -> border brightens + icon lifts; Command Center / bottom nav / launcher strip / stat tiles UNCHANGED; ?legacy=1 unchanged. Watch crop on COMPASS / CRASH-CART / DEPLOY. TUNABLES: opacity 0.28, corner top:-14%/right:-16%, sweep 6s + nth delays, accent radial 22%.
